Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use --mode=skip-build to bypass lavamoat allow-scripts plugin on Vercel

The allow-scripts plugin registers a postinstall hook that fails in Vercel.
--mode=skip-build skips all lifecycle scripts including plugin hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(profile): composable prompts, role refs, and camelCase migration

Phase 0: Migrate all YAML tags from snake_case to camelCase across
profile structs, all 12 default profile YAMLs, and test files.

Phase 1: Add composable prompt fragments — systemFragments with
path/inline entries, EffectiveFragments() normalization, ResolveFragments()
resolution, and validation that rejects mixing legacy with fragments.

Phase 2: Add roleRef support — path-based references to reusable role
YAML files with shallow merge (inline fields override base). Prompt paths
from base roles are rewritten relative to the referencing profile dir.

Phase 3: Extract shared building blocks into defaults/profiles/base/
(reviewer prompt, coordinator-base, worker-web, worker-code roles) and
restructure all team profiles to use roleRef, eliminating duplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: disable lifecycle scripts in Vercel install to prevent allow-scripts failure

YARN_ENABLE_SCRIPTS=false skips lifecycle scripts (sharp native build, lavamoat
allow-scripts) that fail in Vercel's environment. These are not needed for the
site build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: animations now play - mixer.update blocked by _isActive minification

_isActive is a THREE.js internal that gets minified away, so the guard
always evaluated false and mixer.update(dt) was never called. Remove
the guard - always call mixer.update.

Also fix AnimationClipCache to use instanceof checks instead of
constructor.name for track type serialization (minified names like 'bi'
broke deserialization). Bump DB_VERSION to 2 to clear stale cache.

Also fix reconciliation to only hard-snap on 5m+ divergence (teleport),
ignoring normal Jolt physics noise.

commit.message:
Fix ERP connection: replace pyodbc with oracledb thin mode

The ProfitKey DSN uses a 32-bit Oracle ODBC driver which is incompatible
with 64-bit Python. Replaced pyodbc with python-oracledb in thin mode,
which connects directly over TCP without requiring any Oracle Client
installation — eliminating the architecture mismatch entirely.

commit.message:
Separate neuromodulatory nuclei: eta/decay/exploration as independent heads

Replace single critic_head(64→4) with separate small MLPs (64→8→1) for each
neuromodulator, like brain nuclei (VTA, locus coeruleus, basal forebrain).
Shared GRU state provides temporal context; each head processes independently.

commit.message:
Fix: Lazy-load Supabase admin client in all API routes

## Issue
All OAuth and integration API routes were creating Supabase admin
clients at module load time, causing build failures when
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY wasn't available during static generation.

## Solution
- Created getSupabaseAdmin() helper function in each API route
- Clients are now created only when the route handler executes
- Moved from module-level initialization to function-level
- Build now succeeds without runtime env vars

## Files Fixed
- /api/auth/google/callback - OAuth token storage
- /api/auth/slack/callback - OAuth token storage
- /api/integrations/status - Check integration status
- /api/integrations/[integration] - Disconnect integrations

## Required Vercel Environment Variables
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL (client-safe)
- NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (client-safe)
- SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (server-only, for admin operations)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(inbound): descarta resposta se nova msg chegou durante processamento FastAPI

Insere check de wamid pós-FastAPI (Supabase - Verifica Wamid Pós-FastAPI +
Resposta Ainda Válida?) entre Processa Resposta FastAPI e os nós downstream.

Se uma nova mensagem chegou enquanto o FastAPI processava, o last_wamid na
sdr_debounce terá mudado — a resposta é descartada silenciosamente.
A msg mais recente já foi salva no DB e terá seu próprio ciclo de processamento
com histórico completo (ambas as mensagens incluídas).

commit.message:
feat: restore weak particle source term with CIC self-force subtraction

Re-adds direct particle→field Yukawa coupling (HIGGS_SOURCE_STRENGTH=0.01)
to the Klein-Gordon equation, enabling Higgs-mediated attraction between
particles. At this weak coupling, δφ/v ≈ 3% for baseMass=10, keeping the
linearized self-force estimate accurate.

Self-force subtraction removes the particle's own steady-state field
perturbation from both the bilinear sample (modulateMasses) and the
bilinear gradient (applyForces) using the analytical CIC kernel symmetry:
- Sample correction: selfBase × Σ(w_i²)
- Gradient correction: selfBase × (2f-1) × Σ(w_⊥²) / cellSize

Combined with critical damping (no ringing) from the previous commit,
single particles remain stable while multi-particle systems experience
the physical Yukawa-like attraction mediated by the scalar field.

commit.message:
Refactor activity TUI to improve project summary display

Updated the rendering of the project summary bar to show total agents and running agents, while removing the pending, active, and done counts for a more streamlined view. Adjusted team table headers and row displays to reflect these changes, ensuring a consistent and compact layout across the TUI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use server-authoritative velocity/onGround for local player animations

Bug 1 (camera/model alignment): Camera update now uses playerStates.get(playerId)
which contains the predicted position merged with server state, ensuring camera
and mesh reference the same position source.

Bug 2 (animations not working): Local player's playerStates entry now merges
server-authoritative velocity, onGround, crouch from smoothState with the
client-predicted position. Previously playerStates was overridden with
predEngine.localState which uses simplified client-side physics with no real
collision detection, causing onGround and velocity to diverge from what the
server actually computed, breaking animation transitions.

feat: Add Phase 1.2 Exp2 corrected native-CV results and degradation plot

domain shift artifact, not information loss.

Add Playwright browser scraper for zakup.sk.kz, fix eep.mitwork.kz search

Problem analysis:
- zakup.sk.kz is an Angular SPA with WAF/TLS fingerprint protection that blocks
  all non-browser HTTP clients (returns 418 for POST, 500 for GET)
- eep.mitwork.kz was being scraped without keyword search params — only matched
  on generic page content instead of using the site's search endpoint

Changes:
- scraper.ts: add URL-based keyword search for eep.mitwork.kz using
  filter[keyword]= param, parse tr.item[data-key] rows with exact Cheerio
  selectors, extract title/amount/method/dates/organizer/status/link
- scraperBrowser.ts (new): Playwright automation for zakup.sk.kz —
  launches headless Chromium, clicks "Закупки" tab, enters each keyword,
  clicks "Найти", waits for results, opens each announcement, extracts
  all data (title, number, customer, method, amount, dates, status),
  captures direct link from "Открыть в новой вкладке", closes detail panel
- scraper.ts routing: tizilim→JSON API, zakup→Playwright, eep→URL search,
  others→generic HTML
- next.config.ts: add playwright-core + @sparticuz/chromium to serverExternalPackages
- vercel.json: increase search/cron maxDuration to 300s for browser scraping
- package.json: add install:browser script for easy Chromium setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove reward from critic input: predict value from state only

Brain's basal ganglia sees cortical state, not reward directly.
Reward trains the critic (loss), doesn't feed it (input).
Prevents shortcut of just echoing last reward.

commit.message:
GRU critic: give basal ganglia memory across steps

Critic was memoryless (snapshot → value), couldn't track reward history.
Now: GRUCell(activation + last_reward) → persistent state → value prediction.
Also: critic loss weight 0.1 → 0.5 for faster learning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Cycle X pipeline: 8 pitches evaluated, 5 conditional approvals, 3 rejections

Macro outlook identifies stagflation regime with 5 themes: oil producers,
cybersecurity, GLP-1 pharma, gold miners, defensive quality. Analysts
produce 8 theses (COP, LLY, LMT, B, PG, ZS, DCO, ARMN).

IC decisions: conditionally approve ZS (cybersecurity), LLY (GLP-1,
Priority 1 post-FDA), ARMN (gold discovery), B (gold, AEM-replacement
only), DCO (defense sub-supplier). Reject COP (1.29:1), LMT (0.99:1),
PG (1.46:1) — all below 1.5:1 minimum.

Risk resolves gold cluster concern (ARMN preferred over B), adds ZS
technical stabilization gate. No active position changes — portfolio
remains 80% deployed, 20% cash, 10/10 slots.

commit.message:
Fix eta floor: use clamp instead of sigmoid so eta=0 when td_error=0

sigmoid has floor of 0.5 — model could never stop writing.
clamp(eta_scale * |td_error|, 0, 1) allows zero plasticity on expected outcomes.
